name: GrayMatter
changelog: GrayMatter Light and agent distribution hardening: production api-0-compatible /v1 MemoryEntry and /v1/swarm-ops paths, local H2 packaged server path, gm-light-smoke, root/plugin runtime parity, live auth validation, retrieval receipt graymatterPolicy contracts for fail-closed consumers, agent discovery docs, graymatter-bootstrap recovery, and install validation scripts for fresh Codex, OpenClaw, ValorIDE, and ClawHub installs.
